posts.author: wyh27 (winnie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I saw a few people already asked some q’s about this functionality, but I was wondering if anyone has made employee time sheeting automation work for you on Monday.com? Like where a staff uses the Time Tracking function on the board to track their time on the task, then it automatically reporting that staff member’s day and time in daily/monthly reports.

I saw that there might be an app called “Tracket” for this soon, this will be probably be a paid app (right?), I’m wondering if anyone has made this possible using current Monday.com resources and the Time Tracking function?
